2172050.name: Tincho Aventuras a la Carta
2172050.description:
Tincho the capybara has just discovered there's more to eat than grass. In this 2D platformer adventure, Tincho travels across different regions of Argentina to explore its cuisine and help prepare traditional dishes.

Explore levels inspired by real-life landscapes, search for the right ingredients, and team up with native animals like Wadu the penguin, the caiman, and the coati. Each one has a role in the kitchen: chopping, mixing, or cooking. If you do everything in the right order, you'll complete the dish and move on!

This short game includes two playable characters and sample levels to try out the minigames, humor, and educational style of the game. Perfect for platformer fans looking for a cultural twist.
